name: Dumont Tri-County YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Dumont Tri-County YMCA in Teays Valley, WV! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Daily fee, monthly fee, or membership

name: Eleanor pickleball courts
description: Eleanor pickleball courts is a place to play pickleball in Eleanor, WV. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Hurricane Bridge Park
description: Come play pickleball at Hurricane Bridge Park in Hurricane, WV! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. You can’t reserve the courts.
